description: A screenshot of a long multi-paragraph social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The black-on-white text thanks congressional Republicans and names the House Speaker and Senate Leader for work on funding for Border Patrol and immigration enforcement, criticizes Democrats, and states the author will sign an order to pay DHS employees, signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; Thank you to all of our Great Congressional Republicans
